title: Let's Get It Started
why_this_song: Let's Get It Started by Black Eyed Peas (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 40 times; first heard in: "And the bass keeps runnin', runnin' and runnin', runnin'"
Appears 38 times; first heard in: "Let's get it started in here"
Appears 35 times; first heard in: "Let's get it started in here"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Let's get cuckoo! (Uh huh)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "runnin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "runnin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "let's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "let's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Let's get it started in here
(Just) lose your mind, this is the time

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Let's Get It Started", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Let's Get It Started", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Let's Get It Started" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Let's Get It Started" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Let's Get It Started" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Let's Get It Started", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
